reason: Question asks if a truck WITH TRAILER servicing enterprises in the sign's zone may move; answer=Дозволено (allowed) reflects the 3.4 exemption for vehicles servicing enterprises in the marked zone. Official ПДР question image (web.testpdr.com QNS_5390) shows a lorry towing a separate trailer in a red prohibitory circle = sign 3.4. Downloaded clean official image from Wikimedia Commons (File:UA road sign 3.4.svg, 960x960 PNG render) and visually verified it matches.
